creator: walker_643@yahoo.com
text:
> Can you, please, provide more information about which
> version of Samba
> port do you use? Also, I'd recommend you first of all
> to upgrade to the
> latest and greatest(tm) version of the port and check, if
> the problem
> persists.
> 
> There were some fixes in the winbindd land in the last
> (3.0.32) release.

I was running Samba at 3.0.31 when the crash happened. I have updated to 3.0.32 and I have not had this problem since. I read over the changelog for 3.0.32 and I am satisfied that my issue was addressed in that update.

Thank you for your time, Timur. It seems I just got a bad version.

Ian
